_note: Reviewer item #2: typed `createEventDispatcher<T>()` wraps `T` ONCE at synthesis (`type $$Events = { [K]: CustomEvent<T[K]> }`). Render-fn return / `__svn_events` marker / `__svn_ensure_component` all treat `$$Events` as the final $on map and never wrap again. ParentClean's handler `(e: CustomEvent<{id:number}>) => void` matches; ParentMismatch's wrong-payload handler fires TS2345 at the directive position.
